title: extract chat list render out of update()
description: update() is 150+ lines covering event drain, key input, status bar, compose bar, chat list panel, and message panel — six concerns in one method. The chat list block (lines 136-174 of main.rs) is self-contained: it reads self.state.chats, computes display labels, and calls selectable_label. Suggested rewrite: extract a fn show_chat_list(state: &mut AppState, tx: &SyncSender<AppCommand>, ui: &mut egui::Ui) and call it from inside the SidePanel closure. Same pattern applies to show_message_panel and show_compose_bar. This reduces update() to ~30 lines of orchestration and makes each panel independently readable.
